papers_mined.title: Ney Wikipedia Middle Eastern Reed Flute
papers_mined.note: Ney: 9-segment reed flute; oldest played form from Morocco to Pakistan; Persian Ney uses interdental teeth-grip + tongue air-direction technique; multi-register overblow.

papers_mined.title: Playing Technique Persian Ney
papers_mined.note: 4 registers bam (fundamental) + zir (octave) + geesh (octave+5th) + pas-geesh (2 octaves); interdental method; embouchure adjustment + partial-hole quarter-tone.

papers_mined.title: Persian Ney Organology
papers_mined.note: Persian Ney: 3+ octaves; neyzen players; 4 register bam-zir-geesh-pasgeesh; embouchure + tongue + breath null-mode pressure.

papers_mined.title: Persian Ney Rick Wilson NFA
